title: Nose Gear on Boeing 787-9 Dreamliner Collapses, Injuring Several Workers
summary_full: The airline Lufthansa said the cause of the accident at Frankfurt Airport was under investigation. The plane can weigh 279 tons at takeoff.
summary_public: The airline Lufthansa said the cause of the accident at Frankfurt Airport was under investigation. The plane can weigh 279 tons at takeoff.
